about:
Weddings, Events & Celebrations

With breathtaking views of the Indian Ocean at the pinnacle cliff of Bali, The edge is an exceptional venue for every occasion. Whether you are planning a lavish wedding, private party, anniversary or a private Board of Directors Meeting, our professional team will ensure every little detail is taken care of and it will be the occasion to remember.
